items.title: Why base models are not assistants
items.scenario: A pretrained model might continue "The user asked how to make a bomb" with procedural text if never alignment-trained.
items.explanation: Pretraining optimizes prediction, not policy. Alignment stages teach refusals, safe completions, and helpful alternatives—what you expect from Claude in production.

items.title: Model version in API
items.explanation: That string identifies a **released checkpoint** from Anthropic's training pipeline—not a live-updating brain. New training yields **new IDs** you migrate to deliberately.
